text:
30.2.1 – Definition of an Allowed Practitioner 
(Rev. 11386, Issued: 04-27-22, Effective: 01-01-22, Implementation: 05-26-22) 

Allowed practitioners in addition to physicians, can certify and recertify beneficiaries for 
eligibility, order home health services, and establish and review the care plan. Allowed 
practitioners are defined at § 484.2 as a physician assistant (PA), nurse practitioner (NP), 
or clinical nurse specialist (CNS) as defined at this part. NPs, CNSs, and PAs are required
